description: Style Note Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  Product Details Blue check shirt with red, green and white accents, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke with a loop on a back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mid arm button tab, patch pocket on the left chest with branding above it and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteProudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
